Class Rarity

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.fish.Rarity
public class Rarity extends Object
Represents a catch rarity level (e.g., COMMON, RARE, LEGENDARY). Each rarity has an associated base catch chance and color for display. Holds mutation multipliers to influence secondary catch effects.

    static List<Rarity>
    byDescendingRarity()
    Gets all registered rarities sorted by their catch chance in descending order (from rarest/smallest chance to most common/largest chance).

  • Constructor Details

    • Rarity

      public Rarity(String id, double chance, String color, double mutationMultiplier)
      Constructs a new Rarity.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier for the rarity
      chance - base catch chance (0.0 to 1.0)
      color - MiniMessage color tag for display
      mutationMultiplier - multiplier for mutation occurrences

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()

    • getChance

      public double getChance()

    • getColor

      public String getColor()

    • getMutationMultiplier

      public double getMutationMultiplier()

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Gets the formatted display name of the rarity, including its color.
      Returns:
      the formatted display name

    • register

      public static void register(Rarity rarity)
      Registers a rarity in the global registry.
      Parameters:
      rarity - the rarity to register

    • getById

      public static Rarity getById(String id)
      Retrieves a rarity by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the rarity
      Returns:
      the rarity, or null if not found

    • values

      public static Collection<Rarity> values()
      Gets all registered rarities.
      Returns:
      a collection of all rarities

    • byDescendingRarity

      public static List<Rarity> byDescendingRarity()
      Gets all registered rarities sorted by their catch chance in descending order (from rarest/smallest chance to most common/largest chance).
      Returns:
      a sorted list of rarities

    • clear

      public static void clear()
      Clears the rarity registry.
